04a8a338c0d6a6dba3f0c69bc1bdfa5f.question: which year had least population
04a8a338c0d6a6dba3f0c69bc1bdfa5f.sql:
SELECT
  year_col
FROM (
  SELECT '2014' AS year_col, CAST("2014" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2015' AS year_col, CAST("2015" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2016' AS year_col, CAST("2016" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2017' AS year_col, CAST("2017" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2018' AS year_col, CAST("2018" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2019' AS year_col, CAST("2019" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2020' AS year_col, CAST("2020" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2021' AS year_col, CAST("2021" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2022' AS year_col, CAST("2022" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2023' AS year_col, CAST("2023" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2024' AS year_col, CAST("2024" AS INTEGER) AS population_value
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
) AS unpivoted_data
WHERE population_value IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY population_value ASC
LIMIT 1;
04a8a338c0d6a6dba3f0c69bc1bdfa5f.answer: The year with the least population was **2014**. This information was identified directly from the provided data.

a9123b78109ff2318505632ad7a26556.question: what is the gdp of the most populated and least populated years?
a9123b78109ff2318505632ad7a26556.sql:
WITH PopData AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM india_indicators
    WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total'
),
GDPData AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM india_indicators
    WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)'
),
UnpivotedPopulation AS (
    SELECT '2014' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2014" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2014" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2015' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2015" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2015" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2016' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2016" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2016" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2017' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2017" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2017" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2018' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2018" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2018" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2019' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2019" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2019" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2020' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2020" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2020" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2021' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2021" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2021" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2022' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2022" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2022" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2023' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2023" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2023" IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2024' AS Year, CAST(PopData."2024" AS REAL) AS Population FROM PopData WHERE PopData."2024" IS NOT NULL
),
MostPopulatedYear AS (
    SELECT Year
    FROM UnpivotedPopulation
    ORDER BY Population DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
LeastPopulatedYear AS (
    SELECT Year
    FROM UnpivotedPopulation
    ORDER BY Population ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    (SELECT
        CASE MostPopulatedYear.Year
            WHEN '2014' THEN GDPData."2014"
            WHEN '2015' THEN GDPData."2015"
            WHEN '2016' THEN GDPData."2016"
            WHEN '2017' THEN GDPData."2017"
            WHEN '2018' THEN GDPData."2018"
            WHEN '2019' THEN GDPData."2019"
            WHEN '2020' THEN GDPData."2020"
            WHEN '2021' THEN GDPData."2021"
            WHEN '2022' THEN GDPData."2022"
            WHEN '2023' THEN GDPData."2023"
            WHEN '2024' THEN GDPData."2024"
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM GDPData, MostPopulatedYear) AS GDP_MostPopulatedYear,
    (SELECT
        CASE LeastPopulatedYear.Year
            WHEN '2014' THEN GDPData."2014"
            WHEN '2015' THEN GDPData."2015"
            WHEN '2016' THEN GDPData."2016"
            WHEN '2017' THEN GDPData."2017"
            WHEN '2018' THEN GDPData."2018"
            WHEN '2019' THEN GDPData."2019"
            WHEN '2020' THEN GDPData."2020"
            WHEN '2021' THEN GDPData."2021"
            WHEN '2022' THEN GDPData."2022"
            WHEN '2023' THEN GDPData."2023"
            WHEN '2024' THEN GDPData."2024"
            ELSE NULL
        END
    FROM GDPData, LeastPopulatedYear) AS GDP_LeastPopulatedYear;
a9123b78109ff2318505632ad7a26556.answer: The GDP for the most populated year was approximately **$3.91 trillion**. In contrast, the GDP for the least populated year was significantly lower, at around **$2.04 trillion**.

dd49226cb38b7b3db802e542cf3b14d5.question: what was the difference between gdp of most populated and least populated years
dd49226cb38b7b3db802e542cf3b14d5.sql:
WITH PopulationData AS (
  SELECT '2014' AS year, CAST("2014" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2014" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2015' AS year, CAST("2015" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2015" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2016' AS year, CAST("2016" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2016" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2017' AS year, CAST("2017" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2017" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2018' AS year, CAST("2018" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2018" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2019' AS year, CAST("2019" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2019" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2020' AS year, CAST("2020" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2020" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2021' AS year, CAST("2021" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2021" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2022' AS year, CAST("2022" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2022" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2023' AS year, CAST("2023" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2023" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2024' AS year, CAST("2024" AS REAL) AS population
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population, total' AND "2024" IS NOT NULL
),
GDPData AS (
  SELECT '2014' AS year, CAST("2014" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2014" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2015' AS year, CAST("2015" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2015" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2016' AS year, CAST("2016" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2016" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2017' AS year, CAST("2017" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2017" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2018' AS year, CAST("2018" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2018" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2019' AS year, CAST("2019" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2019" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2020' AS year, CAST("2020" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2020" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2021' AS year, CAST("2021" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2021" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2022' AS year, CAST("2022" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2022" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2023' AS year, CAST("2023" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2023" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT '2024' AS year, CAST("2024" AS REAL) AS gdp
  FROM india_indicators
  WHERE "Series Name" = 'GDP (current US$)' AND "2024" IS NOT NULL
),
CombinedData AS (
  SELECT
    P.year,
    P.population,
    G.gdp
  FROM PopulationData AS P
  JOIN GDPData AS G
    ON P.year = G.year
)
SELECT
  (SELECT gdp FROM CombinedData ORDER BY population DESC LIMIT 1) -
  (SELECT gdp FROM CombinedData ORDER BY population ASC LIMIT 1);
result_columns:
(SELECT gdp FROM CombinedData ORDER BY population DESC LIMIT 1) -
  (SELECT gdp FROM CombinedData ORDER BY population ASC LIMIT 1)
dd49226cb38b7b3db802e542cf3b14d5.answer: The difference in GDP between the most populated year and the least populated year in the dataset was approximately $1.87 trillion. Specifically, the GDP for the year with the highest population was $1.87 trillion higher than the GDP for the year with the lowest population.

db497a1a0af7c9f1f4ccca2b22317bcd.question: what was population growth in 2022
db497a1a0af7c9f1f4ccca2b22317bcd.sql: SELECT "2022" FROM india_indicators WHERE "Series Name" = 'Population growth (annual %)';
db497a1a0af7c9f1f4ccca2b22317bcd.answer: In 2022, the population growth was approximately 0.79%. This indicates a modest increase in the overall population during that year.

3c5aaab99246d728d376aad310af786e.question: mortality rate in year 2016
3c5aaab99246d728d376aad310af786e.sql: SELECT "2016" FROM india_indicators WHERE "Series Name" LIKE '%mortality rate%'
3c5aaab99246d728d376aad310af786e.answer: The mortality rate in 2016 was 41.1. This figure represents the reported mortality rate for that specific year.

fcf3f5681c30139a3ee4e8f14f80cfd2.question: what is the life expectancy trend
fcf3f5681c30139a3ee4e8f14f80cfd2.sql:
SELECT
  "2014",
  "2015",
  "2016",
  "2017",
  "2018",
  "2019",
  "2020",
  "2021",
  "2022",
  "2023",
  "2024"
FROM india_indicators
WHERE
  "Series Name" = 'Life expectancy at birth, total (years)';
fcf3f5681c30139a3ee4e8f14f80cfd2.answer: Life expectancy generally trended upwards from 68.9 years in 2014 to 70.7 years in 2019. There was a significant decline, reaching a low of 67.3 years in 2021, but it has since recovered, reaching 72.0 years by 2023.
